_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Financial management involves planning, organising and monitoring financial resources.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in managing data and AI investment portfolios across multiple concurrent initiatives, including prioritization frameworks, resource allocation, portfolio performance tracking, and initiative rebalancing.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-K-001 (LS, cosine: 0.373), LS-S-001 (LS, cosine: 0.363).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.3/10 (raw 0.527). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DDaT-only terms [financial, involves, management, monitoring, organising, planning] vs WIDAI-only terms [across, ai, allocation, concurrent, data, frameworks] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.871 (P=0.891, R=0.851). P exceeds R by 0.040 — the DDaT element's 9 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DDaT element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (94.5%). "Financial management involves planning, organising and monitoring financial reso" and "Skill in managing data and AI investment portfolios across multiple concurrent i" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.408 < STS 0.527 (gap -0.118). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [financial, involves, management] and [across, ai, allocation] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.5%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DDaT terms: [financial, involves, management, monitoring, organising, planning]. WIDAI terms: [across, ai, allocation, concurrent, data, frameworks].
